name: Grape Leaves Stuffed with Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in oil until light brown.
2. Add water with the rice, salt, and kelp; mix well. Cover and cook until the water is absorbed.
3. Remove from heat, cool slightly, and add remaining spices.
4. Place a generous teaspoon of filling onto each grape leaf.
5. Fold up one side of the leaf, tuck in the sides, and roll tightly.
6. Place rolls in a heavy saucepan; fold down and pack tightly.
7. Add remaining water and lemon juice. Cook slowly over low heat until almost all the liquid is absorbed.
8. Serve hot or cold.
